steps.title: Find slope and y-intercept
steps.content:
The point (0, 0) lies on the y-axis, so the y-intercept is 0.
The slope between (0, 0) and (1, 10) is:
$$m = \frac{10-0}{1-0} = 10$$

steps.title: Form the linear equation
steps.content:
Using the slope-intercept form $y = mx + b$ with $m = 10$ and $b = 0$:
$$h(x) = 10x$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
